description: Product-facing artifacts that translate fuzzy user intent into functional parameters consumed by Hermes Video Pipeline branches, BUILD workers, Workbench, and Verify.

artifacts.purpose: Summarize what the provided source media contains before story, rough cut, or highlight decisions are made.

functional_parameters.name: source_assets
functional_parameters.description: Asset ids, paths, durations, media type, and original audio presence.

functional_parameters.name: section_candidates
functional_parameters.description: Coarse time ranges or groups such as opening, training, interview, ceremony, ending.

functional_parameters.name: visual_characteristics
functional_parameters.description: Shot density, motion intensity, face/person visibility, scene changes, and quality notes.

functional_parameters.name: audio_characteristics
functional_parameters.description: Speech/music/original audio presence, loudness notes, and transcript availability.

functional_parameters.name: suggested_questions
functional_parameters.description: Focused questions for Stage 0 when media facts are ambiguous.

review_focus: Does the summary distinguish real footage facts from filename guesses?
Are long-source sections specific enough to support highlight planning?
Are audio/speech facts visible before soundtrack or subtitle decisions?

artifacts.purpose: Provide a reviewable matrix mapping scenes/needs to selected, rejected, duplicate, and candidate materials.

functional_parameters.name: needs
functional_parameters.description: Canonical material needs or story beats that require visual/audio evidence.

functional_parameters.name: candidate_assets
functional_parameters.description: Per-need asset candidates with source refs, usable ranges, status, and notes.

functional_parameters.name: coverage
functional_parameters.description: Covered, partial, missing, generated fallback, reshoot, rewrite, or waiver state.

functional_parameters.name: rejection_reasons
functional_parameters.description: Rejected/duplicate/low-quality reasons preserved for review and Workbench.

review_focus: Can each selected asset be traced to a material need?
Are rejected and duplicate assets kept out of rough cuts?
Are gaps surfaced before BUILD?

artifacts.purpose: Translate story and material facts into functional editing parameters before timeline BUILD.

functional_parameters.name: cuts
functional_parameters.description: Source asset id, in/out seconds, target duration, speed, layer, and reason.

functional_parameters.name: overlays
functional_parameters.description: Text/image/graphic overlays, placement, timing, opacity, and animation intent.

functional_parameters.name: audio
functional_parameters.description: Original audio policy, narration refs, music refs, ducking, fade, and section alignment.

functional_parameters.name: effects
functional_parameters.description: Effect refs, story function, visual family, timing, intensity, and source refs.

functional_parameters.name: subtitles
functional_parameters.description: Subtitle source, style, language, readability constraints, and placement.

functional_parameters.name: transitions
functional_parameters.description: Transition type, timing, duration, reason, and target emotional function.

functional_parameters.name: review_focus
functional_parameters.description: What Workbench and Verify should check against the original intent.

review_focus: Are cuts driven by material evidence and not random sampling?
Does audio/effect/subtitle policy match Stage 0 intent?
Can each creative choice be traced to source facts or user approval?

artifacts.purpose: Render-ready composition handoff for the bounded renderer; it records technical readiness and is not delivery approval.

functional_parameters.name: readiness
functional_parameters.description: Render readiness state, ok flag, and any blocking reason.

functional_parameters.name: owner
functional_parameters.description: Main Pipeline owner state for the composition handoff.

functional_parameters.name: timeline_or_source_refs
functional_parameters.description: Canonical timeline and accepted-source references that the renderer must consume.

functional_parameters.name: output_settings
functional_parameters.description: Required output resolution, frame rate, duration, and audio settings.

functional_parameters.name: final_delivery_claimed
functional_parameters.description: Explicit false boundary: render readiness never claims final delivery.

review_focus: Is the handoff ready and owned by Main Pipeline?
Do timeline/source references and output settings remain traceable?
Does the handoff remain distinct from delivery approval?

artifacts.purpose: Translate music/original-audio intent into section-aware music and mix parameters.

functional_parameters.name: sections
functional_parameters.description: Music sections with target start/end, mood, energy, vocal policy, and fallback.

functional_parameters.name: source_audio_policy
functional_parameters.description: Preserve, duck, mute, replace, or split original audio by section.

functional_parameters.name: selected_tracks
functional_parameters.description: Track refs, provider, license/source note, usable ranges, and probe summary.

functional_parameters.name: mix_parameters
functional_parameters.description: Volume, fade, ducking threshold/reduction, and clamp-to-video-duration behavior.

review_focus: Are music sections matched to story pacing?
Is licensed/source evidence present?
Does the plan avoid vocal music colliding with required speech?

artifacts.purpose: Translate effect intent into controllable visual technique parameters without hardcoding templates.

functional_parameters.name: story_function
functional_parameters.description: Opening, transition, highlight, title, ending, repair, or finishing function.

functional_parameters.name: visual_family
functional_parameters.description: Technique family such as particles, light trails, kinetic type, collage, data reveal, or cinematic grade.

functional_parameters.name: motion_grammar
functional_parameters.description: Pacing, reveal mode, camera motion, easing, density, and duration.

functional_parameters.name: asset_usage
functional_parameters.description: Source refs, generated refs, logo refs, safe area, and masking/alpha needs.

functional_parameters.name: negative_rules
functional_parameters.description: What must not appear, including template pollution or unsupported renderer claims.

review_focus: Does the effect serve the story function instead of just looking decorative?
Are required assets and renderer capabilities explicit?
Does review evidence prove the intended visual grammar?

artifacts.purpose: Translate communication intent into subtitle, narration, voice provider, and readability parameters.

functional_parameters.name: subtitle_policy
functional_parameters.description: Required/optional/off, language, source, style, position, line length, and safe area.

functional_parameters.name: voiceover_policy
functional_parameters.description: Required/optional/off, provider preference, fallback allowed, voice style, and reference audio.

functional_parameters.name: speech_preservation
functional_parameters.description: Where original speech must be preserved, ducked, subtitled, or replaced.

functional_parameters.name: readability_checks
functional_parameters.description: Caption audit requirements for overflow, contrast, timing, and screen safety.

review_focus: Does subtitle/voiceover policy match the user's audience and language?
Are required captions readable on screen?
Are unavailable providers surfaced instead of silently skipped?

artifacts.purpose: Collect accepted product decisions and branch handoffs into the minimal package BUILD can consume.

functional_parameters.name: accepted_handoffs
functional_parameters.description: Manifest refs for material, audio, effect, subtitle/voiceover, and workbench handoffs.

functional_parameters.name: build_inputs
functional_parameters.description: Resolved input files and JSON artifacts required by BUILD.

functional_parameters.name: deferred_items
functional_parameters.description: Deferred child contracts with reason, owner, return point, and gate status.

functional_parameters.name: forbidden_writes
functional_parameters.description: Canonical writes that remain blocked until BUILD/verify gates pass.

review_focus: Are all required side-branch handoffs accepted or explicitly deferred?
Can BUILD run without guessing paths?
Are protected canonical writes still controlled?

artifacts.purpose: Review final or preview output against product decisions, source evidence, audio, effects, subtitles, and delivery gates.

functional_parameters.name: visual_evidence
functional_parameters.description: Keyframe grid, montage/contact sheet, material alignment findings, and effect evidence.

functional_parameters.name: audio_evidence
functional_parameters.description: Soundtrack probe, speech/original-audio policy checks, loudness/ducking findings.

functional_parameters.name: caption_evidence
functional_parameters.description: Subtitle readability, overflow, contrast, timing, and language findings.

functional_parameters.name: repair_routes
functional_parameters.description: Problem type and target branch for verify_revision_packet.json.

review_focus: Does the product match the user's intent and product artifact chain?
Can each failure route back to the owning branch?
Is delivery blocked when evidence is missing or contradictory?

artifacts.purpose: Record the explicit operator decision that promoted a verified preview package into the canonical final.mp4.

functional_parameters.name: promotion_status
functional_parameters.description: Promoted status, reviewer identity, and whether an existing final.mp4 was overwritten.

functional_parameters.name: source_evidence
functional_parameters.description: Relative refs to the source package, packaged candidate video, and the written final video.

functional_parameters.name: companion_writes
functional_parameters.description: Whether delivery_requirements.json and audio_mix_report.json were written as promotion companions.

functional_parameters.name: follow_up
functional_parameters.description: The recorded next_action after promotion, currently write_delivery_gate_report.

review_focus: Was the package status ready_for_operator_delivery_review before promotion?
Does final.mp4 trace back to the packaged candidate video?
Are the companion delivery artifacts consistent with the promoted output?

artifacts.purpose: Canonical film-type spec (sections, roles, structural targets) for a product-route film.

functional_parameters.name: film_type
functional_parameters.description: Registered product film identifier such as graduation_training_film.

functional_parameters.name: sections
functional_parameters.description: Required narrative/product sections and their ordering.

functional_parameters.name: roles
functional_parameters.description: Story/material roles required by the product route.

functional_parameters.name: structural_targets
functional_parameters.description: Duration, beat, or evidence targets the downstream route must preserve.

review_focus: Canon sections are present for the selected film type.
Required roles and structural targets are explicit enough for blueprint/catalog generation.
Unknown film types fail closed instead of producing a generic route.

artifacts.purpose: Graduation-film canon: required sections and structural targets for the graduation training film.

functional_parameters.name: film_type
functional_parameters.description: Registered product film identifier such as graduation_training_film.

functional_parameters.name: sections
functional_parameters.description: Required narrative/product sections and their ordering.

functional_parameters.name: roles
functional_parameters.description: Story/material roles required by the product route.

functional_parameters.name: structural_targets
functional_parameters.description: Duration, beat, or evidence targets the downstream route must preserve.

review_focus: Canon sections are present for the selected film type.
Required roles and structural targets are explicit enough for blueprint/catalog generation.
Unknown film types fail closed instead of producing a generic route.

artifacts.purpose: Compiled blueprint (beats/sections) derived from the film canon.

functional_parameters.name: beats
functional_parameters.description: Ordered story beats compiled from the canon.

functional_parameters.name: section_targets
functional_parameters.description: Target sections and required evidence for each beat.

functional_parameters.name: variant_id
functional_parameters.description: Candidate or selected variant identifier when multiple blueprints exist.

functional_parameters.name: open_questions
functional_parameters.description: Known missing facts that must remain review-visible.

review_focus: Blueprint preserves the selected canon rather than inventing a generic structure.
Candidate differences are reviewable before production readiness.
Missing source facts are explicit and blocking when required.

artifacts.purpose: Candidate A blueprint for the graduation film.

functional_parameters.name: beats
functional_parameters.description: Ordered story beats compiled from the canon.

functional_parameters.name: section_targets
functional_parameters.description: Target sections and required evidence for each beat.

functional_parameters.name: variant_id
functional_parameters.description: Candidate or selected variant identifier when multiple blueprints exist.

functional_parameters.name: open_questions
functional_parameters.description: Known missing facts that must remain review-visible.

review_focus: Blueprint preserves the selected canon rather than inventing a generic structure.
Candidate differences are reviewable before production readiness.
Missing source facts are explicit and blocking when required.

artifacts.purpose: Candidate B blueprint for the graduation film.

functional_parameters.name: beats
functional_parameters.description: Ordered story beats compiled from the canon.

functional_parameters.name: section_targets
functional_parameters.description: Target sections and required evidence for each beat.

functional_parameters.name: variant_id
functional_parameters.description: Candidate or selected variant identifier when multiple blueprints exist.

functional_parameters.name: open_questions
functional_parameters.description: Known missing facts that must remain review-visible.

review_focus: Blueprint preserves the selected canon rather than inventing a generic structure.
Candidate differences are reviewable before production readiness.
Missing source facts are explicit and blocking when required.

artifacts.purpose: Map of source material sections to catalog slots for the product route.

functional_parameters.name: catalog_slots
functional_parameters.description: Product-route slots that need real or candidate material.

functional_parameters.name: assignments
functional_parameters.description: Source refs, status, and rationale per slot.

functional_parameters.name: review_status
functional_parameters.description: pending_review, accepted, rejected, missing, or needs_repick state per assignment.

functional_parameters.name: evidence_refs
functional_parameters.description: Frame, transcript, audio, or metadata evidence backing each assignment.

review_focus: Pending review is not counted as accepted material.
Sensitive render-facing assignments have evidence beyond token/path matches.
Rejected or missing assignments route to repair rather than production.

artifacts.purpose: Catalog map after human/agentic review of section assignments.

functional_parameters.name: catalog_slots
functional_parameters.description: Product-route slots that need real or candidate material.

functional_parameters.name: assignments
functional_parameters.description: Source refs, status, and rationale per slot.

functional_parameters.name: review_status
functional_parameters.description: pending_review, accepted, rejected, missing, or needs_repick state per assignment.

functional_parameters.name: evidence_refs
functional_parameters.description: Frame, transcript, audio, or metadata evidence backing each assignment.

review_focus: Pending review is not counted as accepted material.
Sensitive render-facing assignments have evidence beyond token/path matches.
Rejected or missing assignments route to repair rather than production.

artifacts.purpose: Catalog map bound to real source-tree assets for the training film.

functional_parameters.name: catalog_slots
functional_parameters.description: Product-route slots that need real or candidate material.

functional_parameters.name: assignments
functional_parameters.description: Source refs, status, and rationale per slot.

functional_parameters.name: review_status
functional_parameters.description: pending_review, accepted, rejected, missing, or needs_repick state per assignment.

functional_parameters.name: evidence_refs
functional_parameters.description: Frame, transcript, audio, or metadata evidence backing each assignment.

review_focus: Pending review is not counted as accepted material.
Sensitive render-facing assignments have evidence beyond token/path matches.
Rejected or missing assignments route to repair rather than production.

artifacts.purpose: Selected story shell (beat structure) for the product route.

functional_parameters.name: story_beats
functional_parameters.description: Ordered beat shell with story function and section placement.

functional_parameters.name: variant_id
functional_parameters.description: Candidate or selected shell identifier.

functional_parameters.name: material_expectations
functional_parameters.description: Expected material role or evidence type for each beat.

functional_parameters.name: review_flags
functional_parameters.description: Human review, retarget, or repair markers that block production when unresolved.

review_focus: Story shell has conflict, turn, and feeling rather than only parameters.
Candidate shell choice or retargeting is explicit.
Human story/product review requirements remain visible before BUILD.

artifacts.purpose: Candidate A story shell.

functional_parameters.name: story_beats
functional_parameters.description: Ordered beat shell with story function and section placement.

functional_parameters.name: variant_id

functional_parameters.name: material_expectations
functional_parameters.description: Expected material role or evidence type for each beat.

review_focus: Story shell has conflict, turn, and feeling rather than only parameters.

artifacts.purpose: Candidate B story shell.

functional_parameters.name: story_beats
functional_parameters.description: Ordered beat shell with story function and section placement.

functional_parameters.name: variant_id

functional_parameters.name: material_expectations
functional_parameters.description: Expected material role or evidence type for each beat.

functional_parameters.name: review_flags

review_focus: Story shell has conflict, turn, and feeling rather than only parameters.
Candidate shell choice or retargeting is explicit.
Human story/product review requirements remain visible before BUILD.

artifacts.purpose: Diff describing how the story shell retargets from candidate A to B.

functional_parameters.name: changed_beats
functional_parameters.description: Beat-level differences from candidate A to candidate B.

functional_parameters.name: reason
functional_parameters.description: Why a beat was retargeted or preserved.

functional_parameters.name: risk_flags
functional_parameters.description: Review-visible risk created by the retarget.

functional_parameters.name: followup_actions
functional_parameters.description: Repair or confirmation actions required before production handoff.

review_focus: Retargeting changes are explicit and attributable.
Changed beats still satisfy canon/product requirements.
New unknowns are routed to review instead of silently accepted.

artifacts.purpose: Handoff mapping story beats to planned material before visual selection.

functional_parameters.name: handoff_scope
functional_parameters.description: What downstream owner may do with the artifact.

functional_parameters.name: required_inputs
functional_parameters.description: Artifacts, media refs, and evidence refs needed by the downstream owner.

functional_parameters.name: constraints
functional_parameters.description: Stop gates, forbidden writes, and limitations that must remain visible.

functional_parameters.name: return_route
functional_parameters.description: Owning branch or repair path if the downstream owner blocks.

review_focus: Handoff references reviewed artifacts only.
Constraints and forbidden writes remain explicit.
Downstream owner can identify repair route without guessing.

artifacts.purpose: Human/agentic product-route review decision gating production readiness.

functional_parameters.name: reviewer
functional_parameters.description: Human or declared reviewer identity and role.

functional_parameters.name: decision
functional_parameters.description: approve_all_reviewed, request_revision, reject, or equivalent fail-closed state.

functional_parameters.name: scope
functional_parameters.description: Artifacts and sections covered by the decision.

functional_parameters.name: limitations
functional_parameters.description: Unreviewed items, unknowns, or non-delivery caveats that remain active.

review_focus: Decision is explicit and scoped.
Non-human or ambiguous broad approval fails closed where required.
Product-route approval is not mistaken for final story or delivery approval.

artifacts.purpose: Review packet summarizing the product route for reviewer decision.

functional_parameters.name: artifact_refs
functional_parameters.description: References to the artifacts being reviewed.

functional_parameters.name: review_questions
functional_parameters.description: Concrete reviewer decisions needed before readiness can pass.

functional_parameters.name: blocking_findings
functional_parameters.description: Known blockers, unknowns, or missing evidence.

functional_parameters.name: decision_path
functional_parameters.description: Expected decision artifact or tool that closes the review.

review_focus: Packet contains enough evidence for a product-route decision.
Limitations and missing evidence remain visible.
Approval is not treated as final delivery approval.

artifacts.purpose: Gate artifact recording whether the product route is production-ready.

functional_parameters.name: ready_for_production
functional_parameters.description: Boolean readiness result for dispatching a production worker.

functional_parameters.name: blocking_items
functional_parameters.description: Remaining review, source, visual, audio, subtitle, or effect blockers.

functional_parameters.name: handoff_refs
functional_parameters.description: Artifacts the production worker may consume.

functional_parameters.name: repair_routes
functional_parameters.description: Owning route or tool for each blocker.

review_focus: Readiness passes only with explicit approved review and required handoffs.
WAITING, REPAIR, UNKNOWN, or missing evidence remains blocking.
Dispatch prompt does not hide limitations.

artifacts.purpose: Plan of remaining work to reach production readiness.

functional_parameters.name: ready_for_production
functional_parameters.description: Boolean readiness result for dispatching a production worker.

functional_parameters.name: blocking_items

functional_parameters.name: handoff_refs
functional_parameters.description: Artifacts the production worker may consume.

functional_parameters.name: repair_routes
functional_parameters.description: Owning route or tool for each blocker.

review_focus: Readiness passes only with explicit approved review and required handoffs.
WAITING, REPAIR, UNKNOWN, or missing evidence remains blocking.
Dispatch prompt does not hide limitations.

artifacts.purpose: Candidate visual clips per beat before selection confirmation.

functional_parameters.name: candidates

functional_parameters.name: selection_status
functional_parameters.description: accepted, rejected, needs_repick, pending_review, or missing.

functional_parameters.name: evidence_refs
functional_parameters.description: Frame, video, audio/speech, or reviewer evidence for each candidate.

functional_parameters.name: forbidden_role_checks
functional_parameters.description: Checks that prevent token-only or role-mismatched selections from passing.

review_focus: Render-facing sensitive selections have accepted visual confirmation evidence.
Token/folder/path matches remain candidate evidence only.
Rejected or needs_repick selections block production.

functional_parameters.name: requirements
functional_parameters.description: Subtitle, narration, source speech, and voiceover evidence required by the product route.

functional_parameters.name: coverage_status
functional_parameters.description: Which required communication elements are satisfied, pending, or blocked.

functional_parameters.name: handoff_refs
functional_parameters.description: Artifacts handed to subtitle/voiceover or audio owners.

functional_parameters.name: blocking_findings
functional_parameters.description: Missing subtitle, source-speech, voiceover, or review evidence.

semantic_inputs: story shell or product route plan
review_focus: Required source speech and subtitle coverage are explicit.
Pending transcript or voiceover review remains blocking.
Audio/subtitle handoff does not imply final delivery approval.

artifacts.purpose: Required subtitle/voiceover evidence for the product route.

functional_parameters.name: requirements
functional_parameters.description: Subtitle, narration, source speech, and voiceover evidence required by the product route.

semantic_inputs: story shell or product route plan
review_focus: Required source speech and subtitle coverage are explicit.

artifacts.purpose: Handoff of opener/closer effect design to the product route.

functional_parameters.name: opener_design
functional_parameters.description: Opening visual/effect intent, story hook, and material refs.

functional_parameters.name: closer_design
functional_parameters.description: Closing visual/effect intent, payoff, and material refs.

functional_parameters.name: effect_constraints
functional_parameters.description: Backend, timing, and evidence constraints for the effect owner.

functional_parameters.name: review_requirements
functional_parameters.description: What must be reviewed before the design becomes render-facing.

review_focus: Opener/closer design carries story hook and payoff.
Effect constraints are renderable by the owning branch.
Unreviewed design does not become final timeline content.

artifacts.purpose: Provide a dense, uniformly sampled whole-timeline evidence packet for agent or human review of a rendered rough cut or candidate.

functional_parameters.name: uniform_timeline_wall
functional_parameters.description: Wall index, page paths, sampling interval, page duration, source binding, and complete-timeline coverage evidence.

functional_parameters.name: review_tracks
functional_parameters.description: Optional bound soundtrack-probe and SRT context used to compare picture structure with music, speech, and subtitle timing.

functional_parameters.name: reviewer_contract
functional_parameters.description: Required all-page inspection, narrow review questions, finding classes, and candidate-findings-only authority.

functional_parameters.name: decision_context_and_write_contract
functional_parameters.description: Optional locked_truth context binding with exact source hash, plus reviewer_write_contract.json generated from the live reviewer registry and capability catalog.

functional_parameters.name: review_outputs
functional_parameters.description: Canonical editorial_review.template.json and targeted crop/continuous-playback requests.

semantic_inputs: rendered rough cut or candidate video
optional decision context artifact with locked_truth
review_focus: All wall pages are inspected and cite stable time coordinates.
Story chapters, activity families, semantic repetition, subtitle lifecycle, and audio-picture direction are reviewed without overclaiming exact truth.
Low-confidence observations route to crop, continuous playback, ASR, dedicated QA, or human taste review.
Semantic findings remain flags and never create technical PASS, creative approval, or delivery readiness.

artifacts.purpose: Machine-readable reviewer write surface generated at packet-build time from the live reviewer registry and capability catalog.

functional_parameters.name: allowed_enums_and_routes
functional_parameters.description: Current v2 statuses, modes, lenses, finding classes, priorities, fixable scopes, routes, and live routing capability IDs.

functional_parameters.name: validator_reference
functional_parameters.description: The live registered public reviewer-policy validator capability and executable command reference.

functional_parameters.name: minimal_valid_example
functional_parameters.description: A no-finding editorial_review v2 payload that passes the public reviewer validator.

review_focus: No hand-maintained second enum or capability-ID source is allowed.
Catalog or registry unavailability fails packet creation closed.

artifacts.purpose: Canonical valid editorial_review v2 starting payload for the one V Pipeline Editorial Reviewer identity.

functional_parameters.name: progression_and_findings
functional_parameters.description: Strengths, optional chapter_candidates, evidence gaps, requires_reopen findings, and one primary proposal plus at most one fallback.

functional_parameters.name: no_existing_route
functional_parameters.description: A truthful no_existing_route proposal uses capability_id=null and no_route_reason without fabricated implementation or rerun fields.

review_focus: Lock conflicts are preserved and require requires_reopen=true.
Human creative approval and final delivery claim remain false.

artifacts.purpose: Mapping of story beats to source material used for render-facing visual selection.

functional_parameters.name: handoff_scope
functional_parameters.description: What downstream owner may do with the artifact.

functional_parameters.name: required_inputs
functional_parameters.description: Artifacts, media refs, and evidence refs needed by the downstream owner.

functional_parameters.name: constraints
functional_parameters.description: Stop gates, forbidden writes, and limitations that must remain visible.

functional_parameters.name: return_route
functional_parameters.description: Owning branch or repair path if the downstream owner blocks.

review_focus: Handoff references reviewed artifacts only.
Constraints and forbidden writes remain explicit.
Downstream owner can identify repair route without guessing.

artifacts.purpose: Evidence-bound findings and bounded proposals from the single V Pipeline Editorial Reviewer.

functional_parameters.name: reviewer_identity_and_lenses
functional_parameters.description: reviewer_identity=editorial_reviewer with one or more existing reviewer_role rubric lenses.

functional_parameters.name: subject_and_evidence_manifest
functional_parameters.description: Hash-bound subject, immutable evidence manifest, inspection scope, and explicit evidence gaps.

functional_parameters.name: findings_and_proposals
functional_parameters.description: Observation/interpretation/consequence findings with bounded evidence refs and existing route/capability proposals.

functional_parameters.name: authority_boundary
functional_parameters.description: Findings and proposals only; canonical mutation, repair, creative approval, and delivery claims are forbidden.

semantic_inputs: existing Verify and branch capability evidence
review_focus: Does every material finding resolve to a manifest item, hash, and bounded time window?
Does each proposal use one existing route and registered capability, with at most one fallback?
Are clean, unknown, and taste-only outcomes represented without manufactured faults or machine creative PASS/FAIL?

artifacts.purpose: Immutable subject and evidence inventory used to reuse or invalidate bounded timeline review evidence.

functional_parameters.name: subject
functional_parameters.description: Path, artifact role, full SHA-256, duration, and media role.

functional_parameters.name: stream_fingerprints
functional_parameters.description: Picture, audio, and subtitle fingerprints or explicit unbound state.

functional_parameters.name: evidence_items
functional_parameters.description: Kind, path, SHA-256, generator capability, covered timeline window, source binding, and limitations.

functional_parameters.name: reuse_policy
functional_parameters.description: Parent manifest, reused/regenerated/invalidation rules, and fail-closed mismatch policy.

review_focus: Unknown or mismatched subject/hash state never silently reuses evidence.
Audio-only, subtitle-only, and bounded picture changes record exact reuse and invalidation scope.
